name: ANTERIOR TIBIAL BOWING
definition: WEISMANN-NETTER SYNDROME congenital painless nonprogressive bilateral anterior leg bowing
dominant_finding: anterior bowing of tibia + fibula, bilaterally, symmetrically at middiaphysis
distribution: anterior bowing of tibia + fibula, bilaterally, symmetrically at middiaphysis
discriminating_features: anterior bowing of tibia + fibula, bilaterally, symmetrically at middiaphysis
thickening of posterior tibial + fibular cortices

general: anterior bowing of tibia + fibula, bilaterally, symmetrically at middiaphysis
thickening of posterior tibial + fibular cortices
